[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A person wearing a black hooded mask with bright, stylized white eyes and a white-lined face covering appears in a close-up, seated or crouched indoors under dim lighting.

Main Subject:
The main focus is a hooded figure with a black, rounded hood and a mask covering the head and lower face. The mask has large, reflective-looking white eye areas and a web-like pattern of light lines running across the face, with the hood framing the top of the head. The figure is shown from the chest up with one arm or shoulder area reaching across the foreground, and the person’s hands appear gloved or covered in dark material.

Setting:
The background appears to be an indoor, ceiling-and-wall environment with dark surfaces. Overhead and side lighting creates strong highlights and shadows, with a cool, grayscale tone throughout. A partial rectangular window or framed panel is visible on the left side of the image.

Visual Details:
The image is monochrome and high-contrast, with glossy or reflective highlights on the mask and on the folds of fabric. The hood is smooth with a slightly lighter, arched trim near the top. The eye area dominates the face, with bright curved highlights. The foreground includes a large, dark fabric shape that curves diagonally across the lower half of the image, suggesting seated posture or a close camera angle.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a close-up of a hooded, masked figure with glowing white eyes. It is set indoors with dark walls and a framed rectangular panel visible to the left.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
